title: Photos from the 2018 Student Awards Ceremony - EECS at Berkeley
content: Photos from the 2018 Student Awards Ceremony - EECS at Berkeley [soliloquy id="2685"] The EECS 2018 Student Awards Ceremony was held on Friday May 4, 2018, at 11am-1:30pm in Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall. Categories People Students
